overall.description: A first-person walkthrough of a cyberpunk urban environment at night, transitioning from a dark graffiti-covered alley with a green neon hologram, through vibrant neon-lit corridors, into an open commercial plaza with Japanese signage, and finally into a narrow passage with red lighting. The footage exhibits high-quality game engine rendering with ray-traced neon lighting and reflections.

segments.scene_description: The segment opens on a dark narrow alley at night, dominated by a bright green neon hologram of a baseball player on the left wall. The camera moves forward past graffiti-covered walls and utility equipment, with fluorescent lighting providing sparse illumination in the enclosed concrete corridor.

segments.scene_description: Continuing through the alley, the camera follows a pedestrian walking ahead. The green neon hologram disappears behind as the camera moves deeper into the passage, approaching a metal gate and a visible light source at the alley's end.

segments.scene_description: The environment transforms dramatically as the camera enters a corridor bathed in vibrant purple and green neon light. Moving forward, the camera passes concrete pillars and a vending kiosk before emerging into an open plaza surrounded by a modern glass building with illuminated windows.

segments.scene_description: The camera explores a vibrant open plaza surrounded by cyberpunk architecture. Japanese neon signage illuminates the buildings while pedestrians walk through the space. The camera passes outdoor seating and approaches a food stall before turning toward a narrow passage between buildings.

scene_state.functional_zone: narrow passage between buildings with red accent lighting

red neon light becomes visible on the right wall illuminating the passage

segments.scene_description: The camera enters a narrow alleyway between tall buildings, leaving the open plaza behind. The passage is illuminated by a striking red neon light fixture on the right wall. The camera continues forward, passing pedestrians in the confined concrete corridor.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement from a dark, enclosed alleyway into a vibrant commercial plaza before concluding in a narrow, red-lit passage. It begins in a dim concrete corridor dominated by a bright green neon hologram and graffiti, moving forward past utility equipment and following a pedestrian toward a distant light source. As the camera passes through a metal gate, the environment transforms into a corridor bathed in purple and green neon light, gliding past concrete pillars and a vending kiosk before emerging into a wide-open plaza. The scene then expands into a bustling urban square surrounded by modern glass architecture and glowing Japanese signage, passing outdoor seating and food stalls. Finally, the camera turns away from the open space and enters a confined alleyway between tall buildings, where the lighting shifts to a striking red glow as it moves past pedestrians.
